title: Helen's Campaigns - Helen Maguire MP
text_excerpt: Helen's Campaigns - Helen Maguire MP Skip to main content Helen Maguire MP About Helen Contact Helen Helen's Campaigns Helen's Petitions News Newsletter & Sign Up Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join About Helen Primary Care & Cancer Spokesperson Helen on PIP Helen on Local Crime Contact Helen Privacy & Data Policy Social Media Policy Safe Contacts Policy Helen's Campaigns Helen on Epsom & St Helier Helen on Train Frequency Helen on Thames Water Helen on Cost of Living Helen on SEND Helen on Pavement Parking Helen's Petitions Stop The Delays To Epsom & St Helier Increase Our Train Frequency Stop Sewage Dumping End Pavement Parking My Campaigns From fighting for the future of our local hospitals, supporting families through the cost of living crisis, backing local businesses and calling for cleaner waterways, I'm tackling the issues that matter to you. I'm raising questions in Parliament, meeting with ministers, listening to constituents and engaging with the Government at every opportunity so that we can deliver real change for our amazing constituency of Epsom & Ewell. Stop the delays for St Helier View Improve our trains View Stop Sewage Dumping View The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
